en: Then all Israel gathered together to David at Hebron and said, "Behold, we are your bone and flesh.
zh: 那時，以色列眾人聚集到希伯崙去見大衛，說：“看哪，我們原是你的骨肉。

en: In times past, even when Saul was king, it was you who led out and brought in Israel. And the LORD your God said to you, 'You shall be shepherd of my people Israel, and you shall be prince over my people Israel.'"
zh: 從前掃羅作王的時候，是你率領以色列人出入征戰；耶和華你的 神曾對你說過：‘你要牧養我的人民以色列，你要作我的人民以色列的領袖。’”

en: So all the elders of Israel came to the king at Hebron, and David made a covenant with them at Hebron before the LORD. And they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the LORD by Samuel.
zh: 於是以色列的眾長老都來到希伯崙見大衛王，大衛就在希伯崙，在耶和華面前與他們立約，他們就按照耶和華藉著撒母耳所說的話，膏立大衛作王治理以色列。

en: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, that is Jebus, where the Jebusites were, the inhabitants of the land.
zh: 大衛和以色列眾人來到耶路撒冷，耶路撒冷就是耶布斯。那時，當地的居民耶布斯人住在那裡。

en: The inhabitants of Jebus said to David, "You will not come in here." Nevertheless, David took the stronghold of Zion, that is, the city of David.
zh: 耶布斯的居民對大衛說：“你不能進這裡來。”可是大衛佔領了錫安的堡壘，錫安就是大衛城。

en: David said, "Whoever strikes the Jebusites first shall be chief and commander." And Joab the son of Zeruiah went up first, so he became chief.
zh: 大衛說：“誰首先攻打耶布斯人，誰就必作首領和元帥。”洗魯雅的兒子約押首先上去，就作了首領。

en: And David lived in the stronghold; therefore it was called the city of David.
zh: 大衛住在堡壘中，因此人把那堡壘稱為大衛城。

en: And he built the city all around from the Millo in complete circuit, and Joab repaired the rest of the city.
zh: 大衛又重建四周的城牆，從米羅起，以至城的周圍；那城其餘的部分由約押修建。

en: And David became greater and greater, for the LORD of hosts was with him.
zh: 大衛日漸強盛，因為萬軍之耶和華與他同在。

en: Now these are the chiefs of David's mighty men, who gave him strong support in his kingdom, together with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the LORD concerning Israel.
zh: 以下這些人是大衛眾勇士的首領，就是全力幫助他得國的，又與以色列人照著耶和華對以色列人所說的話一同立他作王。

en: This is an account of David's mighty men: Jashobeam, a Hachmonite, was chief of the three. He wielded his spear against 300 whom he killed at one time.
zh: 這是大衛眾勇士的數目：哈革摩尼的兒子雅朔班，是軍官 ”；《七十士譯本》的一些抄本作“三 ”）的首領；他揮舞矛槍，只一次就殺死了三百人。

en: And next to him among the three mighty men was Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite.
zh: 其次是亞合人朵多的兒子以利亞撒，他是三勇士之一；

en: He was with David at Pas-dammim when the Philistines were gathered there for battle. There was a plot of ground full of barley, and the men fled from the Philistines.
zh: 他從前與大衛在巴斯．達閔，非利士人聚集在那裡預備作戰。那裡有塊長滿大麥的田；眾人從非利士人面前逃跑了。

en: But he took his stand in the midst of the plot and defended it and killed the Philistines. And the LORD saved them by a great victory.
zh: 他們卻站在那塊田中間，保護了那塊田，擊殺了非利士人；這樣耶和華拯救了以色列人，使他們獲得極大的勝利。

en: Three of the thirty chief men went down to the rock to David at the cave of Adullam, when the army of Philistines was encamped in the Valley of Rephaim.
zh: 三十個首領中有三個，下到亞杜蘭洞附近的磐石那裡去見大衛；非利士人的軍隊在利乏音谷安營。

en: David was then in the stronghold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then at Bethlehem.
zh: 那時大衛在山寨中，非利士人的駐軍在伯利恆。

en: And David said longingly, "Oh that someone would give me water to drink from the well of Bethlehem that is by the gate!"
zh: 大衛渴望說：“誰能把伯利恆城門旁邊池中的水，拿來給我喝！”

en: Then the three mighty men broke through the camp of the Philistines and drew water out of the well of Bethlehem that was by the gate and took it and brought it to David. But David would not drink it. He poured it out to the LORD
zh: 這三個勇士就衝過非利士人的軍營，從伯利恆城門旁邊的池裡取水，帶到大衛那裡去，大衛卻不肯喝，把水傾在耶和華面前，

en: and said, "Far be it from me before my God that I should do this. Shall I drink the lifeblood of these men? For at the risk of their lives they brought it." Therefore he would not drink it. These things did the three mighty men.
zh: 說：“在我的 神面前，我絕對不可以這樣作，我怎能喝這些冒生命危險的人的血呢？因為這是他們冒生命危險取回來的。”因此大衛不肯喝這水。這是三個勇士所行的事。

en: Now Abishai, the brother of Joab, was chief of the thirty. And he wielded his spear against 300 men and killed them and won a name beside the three.
zh: 約押的兄弟亞比篩，是三個勇士的首領；他揮舞矛槍刺死了三百人，因此在三個勇士中贏得了名聲。

en: He was the most renowned of the thirty and became their commander, but he did not attain to the three.
zh: 他在這三個勇士中，是最尊貴的，所以作他們的首領；只是還不及前三個勇士。

en: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was a valiant man of Kabzeel, a doer of great deeds. He struck down two heroes of Moab. He also went down and struck down a lion in a pit on a day when snow had fallen.
zh: 耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅，是甲薛族的勇士，曾有偉大的作為；他擊殺了摩押人亞利伊勒的兩個兒子，又在下雪的日子，下到坑中去擊殺了一隻獅子。

en: And he struck down an Egyptian, a man of great stature, five cubits tall. The Egyptian had in his hand a spear like a weaver's beam, but Benaiah went down to him with a staff and snatched the spear out of the Egyptian's hand and killed him with his own spear.
zh: 他又殺死了一個身高兩百多公分的埃及人。這埃及人手裡拿著矛槍，好像織布機軸，比拿雅只拿著棍子下去會他，竟從那埃及人手中把矛槍奪了過來，再用他的矛槍把他殺死。

en: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada and won a name beside the three mighty men.
zh: 這是耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅所行的事，因此在三個勇士中贏得名聲。

en: He was renowned among the thirty, but he did not attain to the three. And David set him over his bodyguard.
zh: 他比那三十個勇士更有聲望，只是還不及前三個勇士。大衛立他作侍衛長。

en: The mighty men were Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Bethlehem,
zh: 軍中勇士有約押的兄弟亞撒黑、伯利恆人朵多的兒子伊勒哈難、

en: Shammoth of Harod, Helez the Pelonite,
zh: 哈如珥 人沙瑪、比倫人希利斯、

en: Ira the son of Ikkesh of Tekoa, Abiezer of Anathoth,
zh: 提哥亞人益吉的兒子以拉、亞拿突人亞比以謝、

en: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite,
zh: 戶沙人亞比該、亞合人以來、

en: Maharai of Netophah, Heled the son of Baanah of Netophah,
zh: 尼陀法人瑪哈萊、尼陀法人巴拿的兒子希立、

en: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah of the people of Benjamin, Benaiah of Pirathon,
zh: 便雅憫子孫基比亞人利拜的兒子以太、比拉頓人比拿雅、

en: Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,
zh: 來自迦實溪的戶萊、亞拉巴人亞比、

en: Azmaveth of Baharum, Eliahba the Shaalbonite,
zh: 巴路米人押斯瑪弗、沙本人以利雅哈巴、

en: Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shagee the Hararite,
zh: 基孫人哈深的眾子，哈拉人沙基的兒子約拿單，

en: Ahiam the son of Sachar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur,
zh: 哈拉人沙甲的兒子亞希暗、吾珥的兒子以利法勒，

en: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite,
zh: 米基拉人希弗、比倫人亞希雅、

en: Hezro of Carmel, Naarai the son of Ezbai,
zh: 迦密人希斯羅、伊斯拜的兒子拿萊、

en: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Hagri,
zh: 拿單的兄弟約珥、哈基利的兒子彌伯哈、

en: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai of Beeroth, the armor-bearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,
zh: 亞捫人洗勒、比錄人拿哈萊；拿哈萊是替洗魯雅的兒子約押拿兵器的。

en: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,
zh: 以帖人以拉、以帖人迦立、

en: Uriah the Hittite, Zabad the son of Ahlai,
zh: 赫人烏利亞、亞萊的兒子撒拔、

en: Adina the son of Shiza the Reubenite, a leader of the Reubenites, and thirty with him,
zh: 流本支派示撒的兒子亞第拿，他是流本支派的一個首領，有三十人跟隨他。

en: Hanan the son of Maacah, and Joshaphat the Mithnite,
zh: 瑪迦的兒子哈難、彌特尼人約沙法、

en: Uzzia the Ashterathite, Shama and Jeiel the sons of Hotham the Aroerite,
zh: 亞施他拉人烏西亞、亞羅珥人何坦的兒子沙瑪和耶利、

en: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite,
zh: 提洗人申利的兒子耶疊和他的兄弟約哈、

en: Eliel the Mahavite, and Jeribai, and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam, and Ithmah the Moabite,
zh: 瑪哈未人以利業、伊利拿安的兒子耶利拜和約沙未雅、摩押人伊特瑪、

en: Eliel, and Obed, and Jaasiel the Mezobaite.
zh: 以利業、俄備得和米瑣八人雅西業。
